title: Flaky Umami Irish Cod Sandwich
description: A date-night worthy, low-sodium Irish dish featuring flaky cod, umami flavors, and a hint of mayonnaise, all on a toasted bun. This recipe is perfect for a special occasion or a cozy night in.
instructions: In a shallow dish, mix together flour, paprika, garlic powder, and salt-free seasoning blend.
Dip each cod fillet into the flour mixture, coating both sides evenly.
Place the coated cod fillets on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake the cod for 12-15 minutes or until it reaches an internal temperature of 145°F (63°C).
While the cod is baking, blanch the parsley in boiling water for 10-15 seconds, then immediately submerge it in an ice bath to stop the cooking process.
In a small bowl, whisk together mayonnaise and lemon juice.
To assemble the sandwiches, place a cooked cod fillet on each toasted brioche bun, followed by a spoonful of the mayonnaise mixture, a few leaves of lettuce, and a sprinkle of blanched parsley.
